# Tests the merge driver invoked automatically by git using 'go tool gomodmerge',
# configured per-repo (local git config + local .gitattributes). This is the
# recommended setup: the tool is declared in go.mod and resolved via a Go
# workspace, so no global PATH install is required.

git init
git config user.email test@example.com
git config user.name 'Test User'
git config commit.gpgsign false

# Set up a workspace so 'go tool gomodmerge' resolves to the local source tree
# without needing a published release or global install.
go work init .
go work use $GOMODMERGE_SRC

# Register the driver locally (per-repo, no --global).
git config merge.gomodmerge.driver 'go tool gomodmerge %A %O %B %P'

# Commit the base state (v1.5.1).
git add .
git commit -m base

# Feature branch: bump rsc.io/quote to v1.5.2.
git checkout -b feature
cp go.mod.feature go.mod
cp go.sum.feature go.sum
git add go.mod go.sum
git commit -m 'bump quote to v1.5.2'

# Back on main: bump the go directive to create a diverging change so git
# cannot fast-forward and must invoke the merge driver for go.mod.
git checkout master
cp go.mod.main go.mod
git add go.mod
git commit -m 'bump go directive on main'

# Merge: git detects conflicts and invokes 'go tool gomodmerge' via the driver.
git merge feature

! grep '<<<<<<<' go.mod
! grep '<<<<<<<' go.sum

go list -m all
stdout '^rsc.io/quote v1.5.2$'
go run .
stdout '99 bottles of beer'


-- .gitattributes --
go.mod merge=gomodmerge
go.sum merge=gomodmerge

-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"fmt"

	"rsc.io/quote"
)

func main() {
	fmt.Println(quote.Hello())
}

-- go.mod --
module a

go 1.21.0

require rsc.io/quote v1.5.1

require (
	golang.org/x/text v0.16.0 // indirect
	rsc.io/sampler v1.99.99 // indirect
)

tool github.com/mauri870/gomodmerge/cmd/gomodmerge

-- go.mod.feature --
module a

go 1.21.0

require rsc.io/quote v1.5.2

require (
	golang.org/x/text v0.16.0 // indirect
	rsc.io/sampler v1.99.99 // indirect
)

tool github.com/mauri870/gomodmerge/cmd/gomodmerge

-- go.mod.main --
module a

go 1.22.0

require rsc.io/quote v1.5.1

require (
	golang.org/x/text v0.16.0 // indirect
	rsc.io/sampler v1.99.99 // indirect
)

tool github.com/mauri870/gomodmerge/cmd/gomodmerge

-- go.sum --
